summary: Shared authenticated header (mode switcher + alert drawer), 5-tab bottom nav, legacy route redirects, and placeholder routes for /trends, /operation, /ai-chat.

interfaceChanges.description: Wraps PageHeader + main + NavBar for all authenticated pages
Six tabs reduced to five; routes /trends, /operation, /ai-chat

mappings.criterion: Header on authenticated screens with mode switcher + alert bell
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_nav_header_redirects.test.tsx::renders shared header with title, mode switcher, and alert bell
web/src/__tests__/test_nav_header_redirects.test.tsx::flips mode and theme instantly from the header switcher

mappings.criterion: Alert bell drawer with badge count
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_nav_header_redirects.test.tsx::opens alert drawer with badge count from mock alerts

mappings.criterion: Exactly 5 bottom nav tabs, Vietnamese labels
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_nav_header_redirects.test.tsx::defines exactly 5 bottom nav tabs with Vietnamese labels

mappings.criterion: No mode label in bottom nav
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_nav_header_redirects.test.tsx::does not show a mode label in bottom nav
web/src/__tests__/test_nav_header_redirects.test.tsx::wraps authenticated content with header and bottom nav
web/src/__tests__/test_nav_header_redirects.test.tsx::maps legacy routes to permanent redirect destinations

recommendations: Manually verify redirects: curl -I http://localhost:3000/products should return 308 to /trends.
